creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Here I submit my latest work, hopefully to be committed.

- Changed "VJE30" to "VJE3": Makefile
- Changed "esecanna-vje30" to "esecanna-vje3": Name of this port,
Makefile
- Modified some texts: Makefile, pkg/COMMENT, pkg/DESCR

-- 
                     /
                    /__  __
                   / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."
